title: Product Engineer
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Support product definition by translating client needs into technical specifications requirements.

  • Develop and refine product designs, prototypes, and validation tests using Solidworks and relevant CAD tools.

  • Collaborate closely with solution and software development teams to ensure mechanical, electrical, and software components integrate effectively and perform reliably.

  • Participate in design reviews and system testing to ensure hardware-software compatibility, firmware integration, and overall user experience.

  • Conduct product testing (functional, reliability, compliance) and drive resolution of issues identified during validation and field trials.

  • Evaluate manufacturability, cost, and assembly processes, applying DFM/DFA principles to enhance production efficiency.

  • Coordinate with suppliers and production teams during pilot builds and manufacturing ramp-up to ensure quality and process readiness.

  • Maintain accurate documentation: design specifications, BOMs, test reports, change records, and technical drawings.

  • Monitor post-launch product performance, analyze field data, and implement continuous improvements.

  • Stay informed on new technologies, materials, and manufacturing innovations; propose ideas for next-generation product enhancements.

  • Provide on-site engineering and standby support during product deployment, field testing, and issue troubleshooting

Qualifications & Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Industrial design ,Mechanical, Electrical, Mechatronics, or Product Engineering* (or related discipline).

  • 2–5 years of hands-on experience in product engineering, product design, or development roles.

  • Familiarity with cross-disciplinary collaboration, particularly with software or IT solution teams.

  • Proficient in CAD modelling and simulation tools (e.g., SolidWorks, AutoCAD and related CAD tools).

  • Solid understanding of manufacturing processes, materials, and quality assurance standards.

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.

  • Effective communication and interpersonal skills to work across engineering, software, and business teams.

  • Self-driven, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.

Preferred:

  • Experience in smart devices, IT products, or integrated hardware-software systems*.

  • Understanding of embedded systems, sensors, and hardware interaction.

  • Knowledge of reliability and compliance testing (safety, EMC, environmental).

  • Experience with production support, supplier coordination, and product lifecycle management (PLM).

  • Exposure to cost optimization, DFM/DFA, and root-cause analysis methodologies.

postedCompany.description:
In a world of increasing connectivity and digital interactions, safeguarding identity and payment credentials has become that much more challenging. This is especially relevant in Asia with unique virtual and physical cultural interactions. Based in Singapore with a strong regional focus in Asia, TOPPAN NEXT TECH brings together three of our innovative business units to deliver end-to-end digital & print for enterprise security & identity needs.


For over 30 years, we’ve partnered with clients facing ongoing security risks to safeguard their operations and reputation in cost-effective ways to process and manage business documents. We’re trusted by governments and financial institutions to produce advanced secure documents for them.


Our security print services include passports, visa labels, certificates, confidential documents, cheques, vouchers, custom & excise stamps, tax revenue stamps, savings books, lottery tickets and machine-readable betting slips. We also offer design and consultancy services (including counterfeit analysis) with constant research into the latest tracking and tracing technologies.


Our publication services include, design, pre-press, high-quality printing, binding, packaging, shipping, logistical support and final distribution.


Our digital print services include data printing, mailing and fulfilment, electronic archiving, image management solutions, database design and management, and data capture and processing.
postedCompany.name: Toppan Next Tech PTE. LTD.
